title: epilobium tetragonum subsp. adnatum
intro: Epilobium tetragonum subsp. adnatum, also known as tall willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe and calm irritated tissues. The medicinal properties of Epilobium tetragonum subsp. adnatum are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing urinary tract inflammation, alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps, and supporting urinary system health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
